name: address-normalization-broker-correction
rationale: Broker initial intake uses abbreviated address ('1142 Tory Rd NW'). Subsequent broker correction supplies fully-spelled-out form ('1142 Tory Road NW') for canonical record. F1.AD canonical-map should resolve via broker_correction tier; normalization should accept both abbreviated and spelled-out forms as same canonical value via ADDRESS_ABBREV_EXPAND.
notes: Two-event sequence. Intentional overlap with A20 (normalization-only) — F22 adds the broker_correction tier interaction.
